# hetzner_server_addons (Data Source)

Lists available addons for a Hetzner dedicated server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) The server number to list addons for.

### Read-Only

- `addons` (Attributes List) List of available addons. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--addons))

<a id="nestedatt--addons"></a>
### Nested Schema for `addons`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Addon ID.
- `name` (String) Addon name.
- `price` (Attributes List) Pricing information per location. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--addons--price))
- `type` (String) Addon type.

<a id="nestedatt--addons--price"></a>
### Nested Schema for `addons.price`

Read-Only:

- `location` (String) Location code.
- `price_gross` (String) Gross price.
- `price_net` (String) Net price.
- `setup_price_gross` (String) Gross setup price.
- `setup_price_net` (String) Net setup price.
